ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "internal_id" INTEGER /* Internal ID of the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Product code of the fire extinguisher */,
  "suggested_name" TEXT /* Suggested name of the product */,
  "website_category" TEXT /* Category of the product on the website */,
  "sub_brand" TEXT /* Sub-brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was manufactured */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the certification belongs to */,
  "fire_rating" TEXT /* Fire rating of the product */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the product (e.g., CE Marked, BS EN3) */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification was obtained */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Date until which the certification is valid */,
  "certification_document_url" TEXT /* URL of the certification document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "toolkits" (
  "toolkit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each toolkit */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the toolkit belongs to */,
  "toolkit_name" TEXT /* Name of the toolkit (e.g., Commander Toolkit) */,
  "toolkit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the toolkit */,
  "toolkit_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the toolkit image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("toolkit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_toolkits_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Corrosion-resistant finish) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "feature_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the feature image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spare_parts" (
  "spare_part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spare part */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the spare part belongs to */,
  "spare_part_name" TEXT /* Name of the spare part */,
  "spare_part_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the spare part */,
  "spare_part_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the spare part image */,
  "spare_part_price" TEXT /* Price of the spare part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spare_part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spare_parts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, sales team, customer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (securely hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_access_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the product (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the review is public */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
